name: AWS S3 Data Encrypted with Imported Key and Key Material Deleted
description: Detects encryption of S3 data using an imported KMS key, followed by deletion of the key material, which can lead to permanent data loss and might indicate a possible S3 ransomware activity.

filterSets.name: AWS S3 Data Encrypted with Imported Key and Key Material Deleted

author: Sunil Bharti & Christopher Ordonez
